invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破135（基于ATR 1.2476和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-10%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 135 (based on ATR 1.2476 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -10% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3050（基于ATR 19.6641和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-10%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3050 (based on ATR 19.6641 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -10% (indicating short pressure easing).
